title: Light Nutty British Walnut Pudding
description: A gluten‑free, adventurous British pudding that blends nutty walnuts with sweet anko red bean paste and a delicate lacquer glaze.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and line an 8‑inch square tin with parchment paper.
Pulse walnuts in a food processor until coarsely chopped, then transfer to a bowl.
Add almond flour, cocoa powder, flaxseed, coconut sugar, vanilla and oat milk; blend until smooth.
Fold in anko red bean paste and maple syrup until evenly distributed.
Pour the batter into the tin and bake for 25‑30 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
While the pudding bakes, whisk anko paste, oat milk and gelatin in a small saucepan until gelatin dissolves.
Cool the tin to room temperature, then pour the glaze over the pudding and smooth with a spatula.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before slicing and serving.
